query: We don't have any end-to-end testing yet — initialize a test framework for this project with config, a sample test, and the right directory layout.
Set up Playwright for our web app: scaffold the config, fixtures, helpers, and an example spec following best practices.
I want to bootstrap our testing framework from scratch — pick Playwright or Cypress and lay down the initial architecture.
We already have Playwright set up and a passing suite — now create the CI pipeline that runs it and gates on coverage.
Review the quality of our existing Playwright tests and flag flakiness, hard waits, and missing assertions.
Write the red-phase failing acceptance test scaffolds for this story before we implement the feature.
